task_text: O1 — Unified push-to-screens endpoint that accepts target = display | tag | group and fans out via existing fleet command path. Includes append-to-playlist mode. Lean MVP cut: scheduled-push with auto-revert deferred (overlaps with existing fleet emergency override). UI-side push-from-templates/layouts/widgets deferred (out of scope; backend supports push via /displays/{id}/push-content + new /push endpoint). Depends on O4 tag infrastructure.
verdict: Lean MVP scope for O1: ONE unified POST /push endpoint that resolves target = {display|tag|group} → list of displayIds → existing fleet command path. Tag resolution uses DisplayTag table (already exists). Append-to-playlist mode delegates to PlaylistsService. All within Vizora middleware; Hermes substrate orthogonal.
